📋 POPIA Compliance Notice
MatricAce SA collects anonymous usage data to improve your learning experience. We do not sell your data to third parties. Ad analytics are processed by Google AdMob. Subscription data is managed by Google Play. You have the right to access, correct, or delete your data at any time. For queries contact: [email protected]
